title: Rig Veda 10.85: The Wedding Hymn
description: The sacred marriage hymn still recited at Hindu weddings — Surya, daughter of the Sun, weds Soma the Moon.
introduction: The sacred marriage hymn still recited at Hindu weddings — Surya, daughter of the Sun, weds Soma the Moon.

translation.text: By truth the earth is sustained; by the sun the heavens are sustained.
